description: AI note workspace for Obsidian with dashboard home, quick capture, daily planning, project tracking, mobile shortcuts, and built-in skills. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: 阿浩learn
manifest.description: AI note workspace with dashboard home, quick capture, mobile shortcuts, built-in skills, and direct API workflows.
manifest.name: FLOWnote

name: FLOWnote

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix Windows OpenCode detection and dark theme by @1095327780 in https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/pull/4
* Guard OpenCode runtime against invalid vault paths by @1095327780 in https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/pull/7
* Stabilize direct agent tool orchestration by @1095327780 in https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/pull/8
* Release candidate: stabilize 0.5.11 upgrade, i18n, and agent flow by @1095327780 in https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/pull/9

## New Contributors
* @1095327780 made their first contribution in https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/pull/4

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/compare/0.5.10...0.5.11

0.5.9 重点打磨 FLOWnote 的跨语言体验、本地模型支持和首页数据可信度，让英文用户可以完整使用，也让使用本机 Ollama 的用户更清楚地配置桌面端与移动端模型。

- 多语言体验补齐：界面、设置项、命令提示、首页文案、内置 Skills 和核心模板进一步补齐英文版本。
- 语言切换更安全：切换中英文时会询问 Skills/模板安装与目录迁移，自定义路径不会被自动移动或覆盖。
- Ollama 本机模型支持优化：模型列表只读取用户本机实际安装的模型，并提供移动端云模型配置提示。
- 首页数据准确性修复：项目统计会排除归档、记忆目录和根级项目总览文件。
- 内置 Skills 只读化：内置 Skills 由插件自动更新，用户可继续新增和编辑自定义 Skills。
- 输入框提示优化：聊天输入框新增“输入 / 触发技能”的提示，帮助新用户发现内置技能命令。

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/compare/0.5.8...0.5.9

0.5.8 重点打磨 FLOWnote 的跨语言体验、本地模型支持和首页数据可信度，让英文用户可以完整使用，也让使用本机 Ollama 的用户更清楚地配置桌面端与移动端模型。

- **多语言体验补齐**：界面、设置项、命令提示、首页文案、内置 Skills 和核心模板进一步补齐英文版本；新英文库会使用英文目录，中文老用户升级后不会被自动改目录。
- **语言切换更安全**：手动切换中英文时，会先询问是否重装对应语言的 Skills/模板，再二次确认是否迁移默认目录；自定义路径不会被自动移动或覆盖。
- **Meta 与首页模板国际化**：Meta 系统目录、模板名称、首页模板和索引相关内容跟随语言切换，避免英文环境里继续出现中文系统文件名。
- **Ollama 本机模型支持优化**：服务商可选择 Ollama 本机模式，模型列表只读取用户本机实际安装的模型；本地服务通常无需 API Key，减少配置成本。
- **Ollama 与移动端分离配置**：当桌面端使用 Ollama 时，设置页会提示手机无法直接访问电脑的 `localhost`，并提供单独的移动端云模型配置，用于移动端聊天和快速捕获 AI 清理。
- **模型错误提示更清楚**：如果本地模型不支持工具调用，会提示用户更换支持工具调用、上下文能力更强的模型，而不是暴露难懂的底层报错。
- **首页数据准确性修复**：首页项目统计会排除归档、记忆目录和根级项目总览文件；进行中的项目会显示真实项目目录名，点击仍进入对应项目总览。
- **首页目录入口重做**：快速入口改成目录看板，不再使用会误创建文件的目录链接，也不再把“收集箱”作为核心入口；捕获内容默认围绕每日笔记流转。
- **内置 Skills 只读化**：FLOWnote 内置 Skills 由插件自动更新，设置页不能再编辑、删除或导入覆盖；用户仍可新增、导入和编辑自己的自定义 Skills。
- **设置页更清爽**：笔记位置、Skills 管理、模板管理等低频配置默认折叠，需要时再展开，减少新用户第一次配置时的信息压力。



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1095327780/FLOWnote/compare/0.5.6...0.5.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# FLOWnote 0.5.1

0.5.1 是一次大版本更新：FLOWnote 从「主要依赖 OpenCode 桥接」升级为「Obsidian 内置 AI 工作流 + 可选 OpenCode 桥接」的双模式架构。

## 更新亮点

- 新安装用户默认使用内置直连 API 模式；已有用户升级后会保留原来的 OpenCode 桥接模式，避免更新后工作流突然变化。
- 新增首次安装/升级引导弹窗，解释内置 AI 模式与 OpenCode 桥接模式的差异，并提供设置入口。
- 直连 API 模式现在具备 Obsidian 原生工具链能力，包括笔记读取、写入、搜索、每日笔记、任务、标签、反链、属性、文件移动、目录创建等。
- 支持导入完整的外部 skill 文件夹，不再只编辑单个 `SKILL.md`；技能管理页可以读取、编辑、删除、导入自定义 skills。
- 新增 `web_request` 工具，支持 POST、Authorization header、JSON body 和 `$SECRET` 占位符，可用于微信读书等官方 skills。
- 新增严格询问、仅危险操作询问、全自动三种工具权限模式；全自动模式会显示风险提示。
- 移动端技能列表、模型选择器浅色模式、推荐卡片、AI Provider 路径等做了适配；桌面端也补齐了推荐卡片。
- AI 回复中的 Obsidian 笔记路径现在会自动识别为可点击链接，点击即可打开对应笔记。
- 修复设置页切换 OpenCode 桥接模式后自动跳回默认模式的问题。
- 修复服务商、模型等选择后回跳的问题，并补强设置组件取值逻辑。
- 修复模型选择器外框、移动端浅色模式样式、插件 logo、消息复制按钮、滚动导航等一批 UI 细节。
- 补充 README 隐私、联网、Vault 访问、剪贴板、本地环境读取说明；OpenCode 子进程只转发白名单环境变量。
- 补充直连 Agent、权限策略、skills 导入、模板管理、路径链接、移动端入口等测试；当前自动化测试覆盖 757 个用例。

## 升级提示

- 如果你已经在使用 OpenCode 桥接模式，升级后会继续保留该模式。
- 如果你是新用户，默认会进入内置直连 API 模式，需要在 FLOWnote 设置中配置 AI 服务商 API Key。
- 移动端使用内置 AI Provider 路径，不能从移动端沙盒启动桌面 OpenCode CLI。

---

# FLOWnote 0.5.1

0.5.1 is a major release that moves FLOWnote from an OpenCode-first bridge into a dual-mode architecture: built-in Obsidian-native AI workflows plus an optional OpenCode bridge.

## Highlights

- New installs use built-in direct API mode by default. Existing users keep their previous OpenCode bridge mode after upgrading.
- A new startup notice explains the difference between built-in AI mode and OpenCode bridge mode, with a direct path into settings.
- Direct API mode now includes Obsidian-native tools for reading, writing, searching, daily notes, tasks, tags, backlinks, properties, file moves, and folder creation.
- You can import complete external skill folders, not only edit a single `SKILL.md`. The skill management settings can list, edit, delete, and import custom skills.
- Added `web_request` with POST, Authorization headers, JSON bodies, and `$SECRET` placeholders for API-backed skills such as WeRead.
- Added strict ask, dangerous-only ask, and full-auto permission modes. Full-auto mode includes an explicit risk warning.
- Improved mobile skill visibility, light-mode model selector styling, recommendation cards, and built-in provider routing. Desktop now also gets recommendation cards.
- Obsidian vault paths in AI replies are detected and rendered as clickable links.
- Fixed settings mode persistence so the OpenCode bridge no longer jumps back to default mode.
- Provider and model selections now persist correctly across settings refreshes.
- Fixed model selector outlines, mobile light mode colors, plugin logo, copy buttons, scroll navigation, and related interface details.
- README disclosures now cover networking, vault access, clipboard use, and local environment access. Optional OpenCode child processes receive only allowlisted environment values.
- Added tests for the direct agent runtime, permission policy, skill import, template management, vault path links, and mobile entry points. The current automated suite covers 757 tests.

## Upgrade Notes

- If you already use OpenCode bridge mode, FLOWnote keeps that mode after the update.
- If you are a new user, FLOWnote defaults to built-in direct API mode and requires an AI provider API key in settings.
- Mobile uses FLOWnote's built-in AI provider path and cannot launch a desktop OpenCode CLI from the mobile sandbox.

0.5.0 是一次大版本更新：FLOWnote 从「主要依赖 OpenCode 桥接」升级为「Obsidian 内置 AI 工作流 + 可选 OpenCode 桥接」的双模式架构。

## 更新亮点

- 新安装用户默认使用内置直连 API 模式；已有用户升级后会保留原来的 OpenCode 桥接模式，避免更新后工作流突然变化。

## 升级提示

- 如果你已经在使用 OpenCode 桥接模式，升级后会继续保留该模式。
- 如果你是新用户，默认会进入内置直连 API 模式，需要在 FLOWnote 设置中配置 AI 服务商 API Key。
- 移动端使用内置 AI Provider 路径，不能从移动端沙盒启动桌面 OpenCode CLI。

---

# FLOWnote 0.5.0

0.5.0 is a major release that moves FLOWnote from an OpenCode-first bridge into a dual-mode architecture: built-in Obsidian-native AI workflows plus an optional OpenCode bridge.

## Highlights

- New installs use built-in direct API mode by default. Existing users keep their previous OpenCode bridge mode after upgrading.
- A new startup notice explains the difference between built-in AI mode and OpenCode bridge mode, with a direct path into settings.
- Direct API mode now includes Obsidian-native tools for reading, writing, searching, daily notes, tasks, tags, backlinks, properties, file moves, and folder creation.
- You can import complete external skill folders, not only edit a single `SKILL.md`. The skill management settings can list, edit, delete, and import custom skills.
- Added `web_request` with POST, Authorization headers, JSON bodies, and `$SECRET` placeholders for API-backed skills such as WeRead.
- Added strict ask, dangerous-only ask, and full-auto permission modes. Full-auto mode includes an explicit risk warning.
- Improved mobile skill visibility, light-mode model selector styling, recommendation cards, and built-in provider routing. Desktop now also gets recommendation cards.
- Obsidian vault paths in AI replies are detected and rendered as clickable links.
- Fixed settings mode persistence so the OpenCode bridge no longer jumps back to default mode.
- Provider and model selections now persist correctly across settings refreshes.
- Fixed model selector outlines, mobile light mode colors, plugin logo, copy buttons, scroll navigation, and related interface details.
- README disclosures now cover networking, vault access, clipboard use, and local environment access. Optional OpenCode child processes receive only allowlisted environment values.
- Added tests for the direct agent runtime, permission policy, skill import, template management, vault path links, and mobile entry points. The current automated suite covers 757 tests.

## Upgrade Notes

- If you already use OpenCode bridge mode, FLOWnote keeps that mode after the update.
- If you are a new user, FLOWnote defaults to built-in direct API mode and requires an AI provider API key in settings.
- Mobile uses FLOWnote's built-in AI provider path and cannot launch a desktop OpenCode CLI from the mobile sandbox.
releases.name: FLOWnote 0.5.0

releases.description:
## Changes

- **Fix: ESC cancel bug** — ESC key now cancels active streaming; abort errors handled gracefully
- **Fix: Cancel race condition** — Stale request cleanup no longer resets new request state
- **Fix: Windows IME compatibility** — Ctrl+Enter works reliably with Chinese IME
- **New: Enter-to-send setting** — Optional Enter-to-send mode (Settings → Enter 发送消息)
- **Fix: SDK transport and session store improvements**
- **Update: ah-card skill refinements**

FLOWnote 0.3.23

- Fix iOS mobile capture input being hidden by keyboard
- Improve mobile keyboard avoidance fallback behavior
Initial community submission release for FLOWnote.
